text: Complete this form and attach it to the relevant application if you answered 'Yes' to disclosure questions, are listed as a director of a corporation, body corporate, partnership or sole trader, or are listed as a 'close associate' on a new or renewal Paintball Venue Permit application or Change of Details form.

label: An applicant that has answered 'Yes' to a disclosure question (proceed to Section 3)
A Director or Close Associate of an applicant (continue to Section 2)

text: Section 2 – Director or Close Associate details

label: Have you been convicted of a relevant offence in the last 10 years (new applicants) OR since your last application (renewal applicants)?
List all relevant offences, Court decisions and circumstances
Details of equivalent authorisation suspended or cancelled under law of another Australian jurisdiction
Additional information regarding convictions or personal history
I confirm that I am authorised to provide the personal details presented
I consent to my information being checked with the document issuer for the purpose of confirming my identity

text: Paintball Permits – Privacy Collection Notice: NSW Fair Trading collects your personal information to assess your paintball permit application under the Paintball Act 2018 and Paintball Regulation 2024. Information collected may include your name, contact details, permit history, third party details, proof of identity, financial information, details of relevant offences and details of mental capacity. This information may be shared with other NSW Government agencies or other States and Territories for compliance purposes. Protected under the Privacy and Personal Information Protection Act 1998 and Health Records and Information Privacy Act 2002. For privacy enquiries contact FTPrivacy@customerservice.nsw.gov.au.
